title: Crisp Clean Infographic Storyboard Poster Sushi
sourceTitle: Create Crisp Clean Infographic Storyboard Poster Sushi

imagePrompts.prompt:
Create a crisp, clean infographic storyboard poster for THE SUSHI CHEF. Wide 16:9 layout, white background, black borders, bold black typography, premium Pixar 3D stylized rendering, bright vivid colors ‚Äî coral salmon, pure whites, jade green avocado, glossy black nori, warm hinoki wood, ivory steam.
Top header:
‚Ä¢THE SUSHI CHEF
‚Ä¢TOTAL VIDEO TIME: 12 SECONDS
‚Ä¢8 SHOTS ¬∑ SHARP ¬∑ PRECISE ¬∑ HYPNOTIC
‚Ä¢Legend icons: ACTION, HEAT, TIME HINT, INGREDIENT
Same Pixar-style sushi chef throughout: young Japanese male, short black hair, pristine white chef jacket, calm focused expression, clean omakase counter, bamboo mat, warm overhead lighting throughout.
8 panels:
1.Rice folded in wooden bowl ‚Äî bamboo paddle mid-fold, steam rising, warm ivory tones, calm and meditative opening
2.Nori sheet held up to the light ‚Äî jet black sheet slightly translucent, glossy, graphic and striking against the bright kitchen
3.Rice spread across nori ‚Äî overhead locked shot, paddle dragging rice in one motion across black sheet, white on black, steam rising
4.Fillings placed in a line ‚Äî salmon strips, avocado slices, cucumber batons lined up precisely, coral and jade green, the most colorful panel
5.The roll ‚Äî bamboo mat pressed and rolled forward, hands applying even pressure, compression shot, mat texture visible, satisfying and tight
6.The cut ‚Äî knife blade coming down through the roll, perfect spiral cross-section revealed mid-cut, salmon coral, avocado jade, rice white, nori black. The hero frame
7.The lineup ‚Äî eight identical pieces standing upright in a perfect row on hinoki board, overhead beauty shot, each cross-section jewel-like and glistening
8.The eat ‚Äî chef lifts one piece with chopsticks, places it in his mouth, eyes close slowly, quiet satisfaction, steam rising softly behind him
Footer:
‚Ä¢VIDEO FLOW: 8 shots √ó ~1.5s = 12 seconds. Rice to roll to silence.
‚Ä¢CAMERA TIPS: overhead locked for rice spread and lineup, dramatic low angle for the cut, side angle for the roll compression, tight on chef face for the final eat
‚Ä¢LIGHT & STYLE: bright warm overhead lighting, coral salmon, jade green, pure white, jet black nori, pale hinoki wood, Pixar vivid colors throughout
‚Ä¢CHEF NOTES: one chef, one roll, eight perfect pieces. Sharp, calm, and deeply satisfying to watch.‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
